title: Bucket Types, Endpoints, Regions, and S3 Express · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible bucket-type and endpoint compatibility matrix with one identity, byte, checksum, policy, cache, ownership, cancellation, cleanup, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bucket-type and endpoint compatibility matrix and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal d…
objectives: Compare general-purpose and directory buckets by namespace, endpoint, zone, ordering, throughput, durability scope, versioning, lifecycle, and feature support.
Construct regional virtual-hosted and zonal endpoints without confusing region, availability zone, bucket name, TLS name, or path style.
Resolve intended region and endpoint explicitly and reject redirects, signing-region drift, and accidental cross-region transfer.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug General Directory Bucket
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Go file-delivery team handles case 7965 during an SDK and infrastructure canary. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate general or directory bucket region, zone, endpoint, reactivation, and session rules; keep browser execution deterministic and move AWS claims to an authorized transfer gate; then change the object version and prove stale authority is rejected. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Compare general-purpose and directory buckets by namespace, endpoint, zone, ordering, throughput, durability scope, versioning, lifecycle, and feature support.

Inspect the General Directory Bucket trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Bucket Naming Creation Gate
steps.instruction:
